reviews.review_text: Very clean and modern shower/toilet block. We had branches move along the caravan roof at night and the grounds keeper sorted it out very quickly

Park has been recently updated - great cam kitchen - with an oven, some treed sights, most have mats. New ablutions block - looks pretty and energy efficient, however very dark and the showers are already showing signs of mould - showers timed to five minutes

Très mauvaise expérience au Bathers Paradise Caravan Park Esperance, la pire de notre voyage en Australie. Nous avions réservé plusieurs mois à l’avance un bungalow, attirés par des photos qui donnaient une impression bien différente de la réalité.

À notre arrivée, nous avons découvert un bungalow vétuste, placé au milieu des caravanes et camping-cars, avec très peu d’intimité. Une forte odeur d’urine était présente dans le logement, y compris au niveau du linge de lit, qui était en supplément.

Lorsque nous avons demandé une solution à la réception, l’échange s’est très mal passé. Au lieu d’essayer de trouver un arrangement, la personne s’est énervée, a affirmé que le ménage avait été fait et a refusé toute solution. La discussion est devenue très désagréable, jusqu’à évoquer l’intervention de la police, ce qui est totalement inacceptable face à une réclamation légitime.

Après 6 mois de voyage en Australie, environ 40 campings visités et de nombreux pays parcourus, c’est la première fois que nous vivons une telle déception. Pour le prix payé, nous ne nous attendions pas au luxe, mais au minimum à un logement propre, un accueil correct et une prise en charge respectueuse. Je ne recommande absolument pas cet établissement.

Bathers paradise is truly a gem! Always all the facilities are clean, tidy and nice. Tania at the reception will welcome you with a smile and help you to check in very fast and easy. Absolutely recommend it!
Klein aber sehr schön. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und wurden super nett empfangen. Alle waren sehr freundlich und die Bäder waren immer sehr sauber.
Beautiful caravan park. The amenities and camp kitchen were brand new and kept in great condition. The staff were lovely and helped us with a late check in. Would absolutely recommend this place
Lovely friendly helpful staff|Amenities are top notch beautifully clean and plenty of space |Highly recommend as a great place to stay
Place was okay, showers felt dystopian and had a 5 minute timer, for the price seems kinda ridiculous. The staff were incredibly rude wouldn’t come again
What a great caravan Park , very busy this time of year. Wonderful new ablution block. Nice welcoming people and the park is very clean and tidy to!

We stayed in our caravan at Bathers over the Easter long weekend and could not recommend it more. The ladies at check in were so lovely, knowledgeable and helpful. The site had lovely green grass for our dog to lay around in and the amenities block was absolutely stunning! The nicest and cleanest we have ever stayed in. The beach was a 5 minute walk to let the dog have a run in the sand and a lovely takeaway pizza shop at the top of the hill. We can't wait to come back next year.

A great spot walking distance to the beach.  Modern facilities with small but accessible sites, this is a well laid out park.  Power, water and grey water sites available with a dump point near the amenities.  Even a dog wash is available.  Enjoyed our stay.

We booked a night for the 13 th of April $65 .
Unfortunately due to recent fuel disruption and driving from Qld we  were unable to travel . We asked  for a refund or a reschedule  several weeks before due date We were extremely disappointed in the outcome as we received neither . All other establishments we were booked with we received a refund .
We are pensioners and we’re looking forward to visiting Esperance .
Please check details before booking as small print only available once booked and pay have rules re refund . However we tried to get refund in the time specified as pensioners this very dissapointing we did not get refund or a reschedule.

A beautiful  clean and modern  park would highly recommend  this park to anyone
Beaches  are amazing
Great little caravan park.

This is a lovely caravan park. quite small however has a lot to offer. The lady at reception was very helpful and friendly. our site was adequate with a concrete slab. unfortunately we had a big tree on the corner but we managed with no trouble to park in our site. The sites are a bit small. The amenities block is outstanding! Newly renovated and the best I have seen anywhere in Australia. Laundry is also fabulous with heaps of front loader washing machines and 4 dryers. plenty of bench space for folding and great washing lines. This park even has a brand new dog wash. Pet friendly park. Highly recommended and will definitely return.

Ein schöner Caravan Park mit sehr modernen und sauberen Badezimmern. Die Campingküche ist gut ausgestattet und es herrschte reger Verkehr, während unseres zweitägigen Aufenthalts. Die MitarbeiterInnen sind sehr freundlich.

We travelled all the way from Tassie in a swag and really enjoyed our stay here. The manager Tania was very accomodating, friendly, took the time to have a chat and even recommended a few places near by. The only thing that I would’ve preferred would be a pub closer!
The toilets, showers and utilities are very clean and modern. Considerate campers and surrounding areas. Nice to fall asleep to the sound of crashing waves and camping under trees for shade.
Please support this lovely caravan park 👏🏽 we will hopefully be back one day in the future

OMG this van park is small and beautiful.  |A beautiful welcome from staff ! Groundsmen that take pride in the lawns. So soft and green. A stones throw from the beach. The amenities are just the wow factor. So modern with rainfall shower heads. Immaculately cleaned. A doggie wash bath. Beautiful laundry. Just amazing. Good size bays. I just didn't want to leave and neither did the dog. Will be back again and for longer next time.
Alles neu und sauber, sehr freundliche und hilfsbereite junge Dame an der Rezeption, nah am schönen Strand, die Bäume am Platz müssen noch etwas wachsen, dann ist es richtig gemütlich. Top!

Great van sites and very close to the beach - dog friendly with fantastic amenities and laundry.
Nice and quiet too.

Lovely small caravan park just a street away from the beach. Very modern amenities, kept clean and tidy. Nice grassy sites, plenty of shade. We stayed on an unpowered site and had sufficient space for our setup. Friendly and helpful staff in the office. Would stay again!

This is one of our favourite caravan parks. Tanya and her staff are amazing. Im so grateful for the accomodation provided and kindness showed to my boys and I. We love our early morning walks along the beach, its so close to the CP. The facilities are new and lovely and clean. This is a dog friendly park, Pumba our American Staffy loved having soft grass around the sites and loved making new friends. For those looking for a cosy, dog friendly, quiet park, close to everything you need, without the hussel and bussel, Bathers Paradise is a definate winner 🫶

I am reluctantly giving this a five as with the incredible customer service received it deserves a six! This park is spotless and extremely well maintained. I will definitely be calling in again and can only hope my review doesn’t make it any more popular 🤫😊

Wir waren sehr zufrieden! Tolle moderne, neue Sanitäranlagen, eine moderne gut ausgestattete Küche und nettes Personal. Die gesamte Anlage ist sehr gepflegt. Der Platz ist relativ klein, man hat nur kurze Wege zur Küche und Toilette. Nur 3 Minuten läuft man zum Strand!

Unser Stellplatz war super: Schattig und groß!
Allerdings müssen wir dazu sagen, dass es auch enge Stellplätze direkt hintereinander gibt, bei denen man weniger Privatsphäre hat.

Powered site for 2A + 2C was $85 a night on a Tuesday. Far too pricey for the site, especially seeing as they don’t allow you to use your own washing machines or fill up water tanks. Facilities were clean and modern. Staff friendly and allowed us an 11am checkout. Wi-Fi was a bit patchy but worked OK most of the time. Small caravan park so glad we arrived early so that we could drive through onto our site easily.

Great facilites and the showers and bathrooms were spotlessly clean.
Great camp kitchen & outdoor grills too!
The facilities were perfect, clean and well maintained. Staff were accommodating and pleasant to deal with. Camp sites were well spaced and easy to access. Will be definitely coming back.

Lovely little site. Best toilets and showers of the whole trip (10 sites). Great location (5 minutes walk) for a beach with no one else on it! Good size pitch but no shade on our pitch, so needed the awning.

Absolutely awesome stay.
This is a lovely quiet park, with trees & green grass.
The location was great, close to a local IGA, so no need to head into town, if you don't want.
The amenities were spotless, even has music playing while you shower!
The staff were amazing, so friendly, nothing was too much trouble.
I would definitely recommend this park and we will certainly return.

Dreadful customer relations and ethics

UPDATE TO PARK REPLY.

Firstly I did not book online, so the T & C's were not reviewed.  Irrespective of this, it is impossible know that i would get a smashed windscreen within the 14 day period prior to arrival, to be eligible for a refund (as yet I don't posses a crystal ball)

Regarding a credit 'within a specified time frame' I live over 1000 kms away, so towing a van this would cost $800 round trip on fuel  as well as taking a weeks leave from work !!!

Reading other review I see you have history. I would suggest a review of your policies .

Original msg.....

Dreadful customer relations and ethics. Firstly, i was forced to pay for ALL my stay when booking months ago. En route to Esperence , I got a smashed windscreen , so had to stay in Albany to get it fixed (had to wait 5 days). This  obviously ment I couldn't get to Esperenece and the caravan park. Relaying my situation to the caravan park, they said that NO REFUND would be forth coming. Shocking, don't touch this place with a barge pole if you can help it, they don't deserve your hard earned dollars.

One of the best caravan parks we’ve ever stayed at! The toilet and shower facilities are brand new and exceptionally clean — such an important feature in any park. Even though I have my own shower in the caravan, I chose to use theirs because it was such a great experience. The location is absolutely perfect, just a minute’s walk to the beach and scenic walking paths. Highly recommended!

Small site, great bathrooms best in WA.
Short walk into town along the foreshore.

Bathers Caravan Park is a fantastic place to stay. Great location close to the beach and town, clean amenities, and well-maintained grounds. Staff are friendly and helpful, and the park is quiet and relaxed. Would definitely stay again. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Exorbitant pricing ($80 per night) and the park doesn't have a pool. Most disappointingly was the showers. Timed 5 minute showers, with low flow shower heads. While I applaud any effort to save water, this felt only like a way to save money rather than any positive move for the environment. Especially with sprinklers left on for hours at a time. And no recycling bins that I could find. Location was not really close to the beach and a drive into town. Wording of signs could use A LOT of work, bathrooms had signs advising non guests could not use showers and police would be called.... not that I had guests attend the park, but it's just rude and not a way to make top dollar paying customers feel welcomed.
Staff were friendly.
This is a lovely little caravan park.  Location is one street from the beach. New bathrooms, lovely and clean. Some nice grass sites
Very bad expérience
So close to the beach, lovely grassy sites,attentive management and awesome facilities
Powered caravan site in the corner under lovely shady trees. Great staff and a great quiet location.

The campsite itself was nice and clean. Good toilets and near to the beach. Unfortunately as soon as we arrived to the campsite to check in after a long drive, which was also our first stop in WA, we received the worst welcome with a member of the housekeeping team short man with white hair , coming up aggressively to the car with kids in the back and says 'Is this how you park your car in NSW? This is WA', obviously didnt like that we were from NSW and then continued to glare at us as we were setting up. He was obviously a very unhappy person, but to be doing this in front children is unacceptable and we will not be coming back or recommend it to anyone. Do better, as a holiday park one of your values should be friendliness not hostility

So cramped, no sense of privacy or comfort. Shower timer with low pressure makes it impossible to wash your hair in the allotted time (maybe okay for those with short hair). No wifi and queue for the kitchen amenities. Wouldn’t recommend here, rip off for the price. Only bonus is the close walk to the beach.
Facilities have all been updated. Parking for caravans is very tight. Overall a pleasant place
Great amenities. Good service

Our Club spent about a week at this park. The grounds clean, tidy and a mixture of grass/concrete pads/matting. The amenities are new,clean and very modern. The staff were excellent and were very prompt to rectify an electrical problem when one of our friends on an adjoining site tripped the electricals in our immediate area. The location is close to the main town with a Chemist,IGA,Fish Restaurant and Fuel Station just a few minutes up the road.

Even though I was parked right near the street, it was fairly quiet at an earlyish hour. The young lady at reception was very sweet and professional, although the wifi code was not given but coyly mentioned on the sheet- you had to ask for it! It didn't really matter anyway as so many people were on it- didn't work at all for me and  I was right next to office. The new showers were clean and pretty, on a 5 min timer, but good hot water with massive showerheads (you'll need a showercap!). Only problem was like a sauna- need more extraction fans- brace for mould! The camp kitchen was tiny, clean and there was a line both times I went for the 1 sink. The spots are very close together but everyone seemed respectful. The worst part was the sand. It was a wet day, so it was everywhere! Needs concrete pads/ more grass coverage. All in all, one of the decent ones.

Visited a week with our Avan caravan club. Excellent facilities,  best camp kitchen I've seen in a long time, even an oven. Toilet/showers very new.
Would recommend a stay here.
3km from town but an easy bike ride or walk. Shops & restaurants walking distance 🌞

Awesome little caravan park as a base whilst visiting the national park and glorious beaches Esperance has to offer. Tanya is an absolute legend and was extremely accommodating throughout our stay. Amenities are brand new and top notch. Everything was clean and kept to a high standard. Thanks Tanya for everything.

If you like being parked in like a sardine and like listening to your fellow campers arguing and fighting ect this place might be for you.
I’ll never go back, worst park I’ve ever been to and it’s not worth it, I nearly dove out to get away from the place but had drinks to deal with the chaos so I was stuck, unfortunate until the morning, got woken early from car doors slamming, got me going and gone.

WOW 😮!! Love this park 💖
Perfect location; well set out; ridiculously good amenities which are cleaned to an awesome standard!
But then there is the staff, some of the best!  Special shout out to super woman Tania, always smiling, efficient & funny 😁
We will be back!!!!!
We liked it, exellent facilities
Quiet and peaceful even when busy. Grass sites and new amenities. Would stay here again.

Bathers Paradise Caravan Park in Esperance is a fantastic place to stay! The facilities are modern and spotless, and it’s just a short 5-minute walk to the beach. It’s conveniently located close to shops and local attractions. The staff were friendly and accommodating, and the park is both pet-friendly , and includes a dogwash and dump point, excellent value for money. Highly recommended!

Smallest camp-sites! False advertising to call them "large" as on their website. Hardly enough room to park your car if you have a caravan. Felt like we were packed in like sardines. Absolutely over priced for $70 a night. One staff member made sexist comments.
Showers restricted to 5 minutes and low water pressure makes it hard to wash your hair.
Driers are small $2 for 10 minutes, most expensive we've seen even in much more remote places.
After being able to change sites our caravan could not reach the power/water connections where we instructed to park. After a too long day we didn't bother moving again and stayed off grid not wanting to speak to the staff again.
The bathrooms are great and the camp kitchen is decent but the bin was overflowing and there were no mugs or cups, almost no cutlery. One dirty tea towel, no paper towel or cloth to aid cleaning up after yourself.
Can walk 5 mins to the beach.

We made a 2 day double booking by accident and tried to cancel 10 minutes after mistake was made. They would not refund one night stating time was already spent in setting up the booking. This was ridiculous but decided to stay rather than loose the money. Sites are very close, grounds are clean. Location is  also good but do consider the next door park.

Somehow not our favorite camp in the area. But the kitchen and shower black seems to have been renovated recently and were very clean. Not a huge fan of the shower Times but understandable. Great location and nice to have a proper kitchen to cook when it rain

The place was packed all along the 3 days we stayed here. Facilities and kitchen all brand new and excellent.
Hard to book on the website (impossible for the same day).  Just 1 street behind the beach.

This site is just a residential block turned into a caravan park. Everyone is packed in like sardines and there is no feel or comfort whatsoever. $49 per night for an unpowered tent size slab of lawn against a colourbond fence with no room and swearing locals living behind was not what I expect for that sort of price. The only positive was the amenities were fresh and the location to the beach.
Unfortunately, I booked for 2 nights and left halfway through night one. Waste of $$

Brand new amenities (5 star hotel)
And Georgia the receptionist was fantastic. More than happy to help us out
Well worth the stay

Very friendly staff updated laundry and amenities block close to beach and town can not recommend this park highly enough has been an absolute pleasure to spend 3 nights here and being end of school holidays wasn't charged extra or minimum 3 night stay like others

Brand new amenities & fabulous camp kitchen with a massive oven! Lovely hard working staff. Dog wash. Dump point. Lots of washing machines. Various site sizes. One street back from beach, can hear the waves. Outdoor shower to clean up after beach. Bike / walking path along the esplanade. IGA a block away.

Very clean and tidy. Good spot and reasonable price. Only bug is showers on a 5 minute timer which is not sufficient to wash yourself properly and shave as there is no hot water at basins.big mistake in my book to an otherwise good park

We are currently here at Bathers Paradise Caravan Park and are extremely happy with this beautiful park.  The facilities are like staying at a 5 star hotel. The staff and owner are very knowledgeable of the local area and very friendly.
Top Campingplatz

Love that place and friendly owner
Close to the beaches and Shop ,Gas station
Clean toilet and bathroom..
We will go back again for sure

We have a large van and found the caravan sites very spacious with concrete pad. The amenities were brand new and stylish, the laundry had plenty washers and driers. There is a dog wash facility. The camp kitchen was fitted out with large cooking appliances and everything you need. We were lucky enough to be entertained by fellow campers playing and singing after dinner in the camp kitchen.
The staff were very friendly and welcoming, I would definitely stay here again.

This caravan park has undergone major renovations since we were here 18 months ago. The amenities are five star, the lawns have been refurbished and the kerbing makes the park look very neat and tidy. The roadside sites all have individual gates to allow drivers to-through - very clever and thoughtful design. And the staff are super friendly and welcoming. The trees have been heavily pruned so there are no low hanging branches to navigate anymore. Once they reshoot they should provide a nice canopy. In the meantime there’s plenty of clear sky at every site. Would highly recommend this park.
Very clean and newly refurbished.

It was a great park to stay in, about a block back from the beach, the amenities are fantastic, the sites are generous and it wasn’t too crowded. It was very reasonably priced for a powered site. The staff were very friendly and helpful, offering local sightseeing suggestions.

Have nothing but good to say about this park,  newly built amenities are 5 star. Manager and staff friendly and helpful  we ended up staying 2 extra nights. Lawns are in process of growing, and they are planting lots of lovely fruit trees.  Great park

Wow what a find this place is. Greeted by wonderful friendly staff, who gave us a rundown of the park and must see places around Esperance. The amenities here are next level. Spotlessly clean. Camp kitchen has to be seen to be believed all the appliances you could need to cook up a great meal. We stayed 4 nights and definitely recommend this park.

WILL BE a really good park once everything is complete. I have nothing bad to say about the park itself, however the lady in reception obviously doesn't want to be here on a Saturday. We booked for 3 nights, the lady in reception was happy and very nice, even honoured the advertised price of $35.00, the park was virtually empty. I forgot to drop in on my way out to book an extra night, the very unfriendly lady rang my wife near 10am, would not honour the advertised price, even complained about giving us the advertised 10% discount. SHE WAS A REAL COW. Anyway, we are returning in 2026, because of this persons terrible attitude, we won't be coming back to this park.
We can't recommend this park highly enough. All the facilities are new and clean. The best camp kitchen ever. Sorry to have to move on.
Small sites, amenities brand new and clean, credit to the new owners for updating the park, heaps to do around the area.

Toilets and showers all new looking and very clean. Close access to the town. Staff all super helpful. Cabin was simple but nice. Hot water doesn’t last more than about 10minutes. Cutlery, plates etc not cleaned nor the table but it was easy enough to just wash as we needed things.

We have travelled throughout using GDay, Discovery and Summerstar parks.
Bathers Paradise is so far in front of the others in terms of Staff service, amenities, and price .
My suggestion is to support the smaller independents you will not regret it.

Awesome New amenities done in an absolutely 💯 % wow factor way 😀
We are in a Toyota Coaster bus, towing a Jimny on a trailer &  Our friends are in a Mitsubishi Rosa bus & there was plenty of room. We  would definitely come back here Again.  Well set out, very quiet & everyone is so happy & friendly 😊 Thank for making our 4 days so good.
Great place, facilities are new and clean. We had a campervan on a powered site $35 per night. Showers are timed to 5 minutes. Dog washing facilities

Dishonest manager who is greedy for money in the off-season, takes advantage of travellers.
The 2 of us are travelling in 2 cars, 1 is our camping car with the roof-top tent, and the other is a regular car for work/storage. So far in our Aus lap (all of East coast, NT, WA coast), every single caravan park has been happy for us to park our work car on the campsite or in the visitor parking. The manager here said we had to pay an extra $30 to park it at a separate campsite, or to park it back in town as she claims there is absolutely no other parking in the whole area at all.
After paying the extra money, she showed us the park map which coincidentally has 2 separate lots of visitor parking, all of which only had 1 car parked there in our entire 1 night stay.
$60 for a terrible night’s sleep - the birds in the tree above us were loud and constant. It would have been better to leave town and stay at a highway rest stop with road noise, than to stay here.
Don’t waste your time or money here.
We stayed in our caravan they have been only open for month now

Great spot! The park has been newly refurbished and everything was so clean and facilities were great. Showers clean and warm and toilets were brand new. Laundry, fully equipped kitchen and even a dog wash! Spacious and shaded camper sites. The staff were so friendly and helpful. Would definitely recommend
Really lovely property. So well cared for

Standard Campingplatz
Sanitär Anlagen werden im Juni 2025 NEU gemacht, haben es auch nötig.
Personal sehr nett

Great park. Close to the beach and fantastic walkways. Amenities always clean considering how old they are, but new ones to be installed June this year. All staff are friendly and approachable.
A couple of things I thought would be helpful.
Sites need to be better marked so you know where to park up and if you intend to help people onto sites because some are tight, you really should know what your doing. But overall, great park. Will be back
Great location to the beach, just one block back... amenities tired , but getting new facilities built in June 2025. This park is worth the stop over.  Very clean grounds and friendly Park Manager.

Nice park, under new management so I think with the new amenities planned it will be a great caravan park in the future.  Current amenities block is very dated.  Not a big caravan park which we liked.

We camped in our slide on camper. Was a fantastic park , with great ammenities, and water taps everywhere which was great! And it’s rare! Well done ! I understand there are new managers and they are friendly and doing a great job! Travelling around Aussie, this the best park so far! And we’ve travelled from Cairns Qld

Stayed at this lovely park for 17 nights due to Easter and WA school holidays. From QLD so forgot to factor this in..
Wonderful park with extremely clean amenities but the best part of our stay were the staff. Very professional,  and happy to help with whatever you need..***** five stars 👏👏
So close to alot of easy pretty drives and good shopping to restock. Try the Pink Lake Butchery while here..awesome meat.
Would be happy to recommend and return, thank you team..keep up the great work 🥰
Hugs  from Amanda and Lynda 😍

I have only great things to say about bathers paradise. We were looking for a park to fit our van after an unfortunate issue at a previous campsite over the easter holiday and the ladies were so lovely and accomodating!! We stayed two nights and because it’s a smaller site everything was in an easy to reach range and the amenities were clean and tidy. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay being so close to all things esperance !! Thank you for your lovely hospitality
Great location , big sites and amazing servicw
My dog and I stayed here for 4 days. The staff are so friendly and helpful. Great location. Good facilities. Thank you Tania. We will be back. Anja and Buka
We really enjoyed our 3 night stay. Staff were so helpful & friendly. The park is lovely & clean with all the amenities. Location is great & close to town. We will definitely be back.

We enjoyed our stay here. Great as dog friendly and beach within minutes. Staff very helpful. Some of the sites are quite small, the self contained camp kitchen  is too small for numbers needing it but is well stocked. A new ablution block is promised for next year.
Nice experience

I had booked a powered site for two nights. Everything was well looked after and clean. Customer service was amazing!
Only complaint was my site did not have much grass or a mat underneath (although I paid the same rate as the other powered sites) so I was constantly getting dirt inside my van
Location is good close to beach ! They pack you in like sardines on the sites. Amenities average and old , but apparently Reno’s this June !

Perfect stay for a short period.
Clean amenities and love that we have access to laundry. Close to the beach and town.
Would stay again!
Lovely little caravan park with all amenities nearby. Showers are a bit tired, but apparently being renewed June 25.
Nice park, clean amenities,  close to Esperance and surrounds
Always a nice place to stay with the Caravan, short walk to the beach
Shower and toilet facilities here were very poor, there were big gaps in the doors on the showers that you could see through. There was a basic laundry room. Definitely room for improvement.
Friendly staff, older amenities but they are upgrading mid 2025 and they were always kept clean, smaller park but short walk to the beach and decent size sites
Wonderful site, close to beach. Staff really friendly and helpful managing to squeeze us in.  Facilities excellent.  Thank you

Quiet lovely Caravan Park
Amenities can do with a makeover however this place has everything you needed
Full camp kitchen utensils
Hot shower, hand soap, paper towel
Best of all, lovely people and a pet friendly safe place
Good location close to foreshore. Site great for caravans with private ensuite. Public bath and toilet are horrible. Need upgrades desperately. Quiet and patrons are decent
Great location, facilities. Will definitely be back

Great spot , Tania fitted us in as everywhere totally booked  out. A big mention is the grounds  keeper Jeff absolutely a hard working man  who doesn't  stop and very informative.  , and his herb garden is well looked after and used in our cooking.  Good work Jeff.

Very friendly, helpful staff, great location, lovely clean ablutions and fantastic laundry set-up.
We had a shady unpowered site & it was great.
Great staff, surprisingly good location and quiet
Guter CP wir hatten den Platz 20 ohne Strom, perfekt wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Waschräume waren sauber wir würden wieder kommen.

I would like to congratulate Tania who did an outstanding job in refunding my money for a cancellation that was 8 months in advance. Tania went the extra mile to ensure I could get my money back under the circumstances. Tania was understanding on the phone and realised the Big 4 website had made a mistake. Despite the Big 4 mistake Tania was the one that refunded the money and not Big 4. I would like to congratulate Tania who was very professional, listened carefully to the client's needs and went the extra mile. Thank-you Tania for your dedication in your job. One very happy client.

Accueil très chaleureux, douches et toilettes propres. Très bonne cuisine couverte. Il y a la wifi dans tout le camping! J’aurais aimé avoir une place sans power pour payer moins chère, mais je suis arrivée un peu trop tard.. rassurée que la dame de l’accueil Mrs Lee, me dise qu’il restait une place.. i’m so lucky. Restaurant et supermarché proche pour s’y rendre à pied.
Love this place, dog friendly. Great staff.

Caravan park is in a good location in Esperance and very close to the beach and  many Esperance attractions, including all the famous beaches in Esperance. Many shops close.
Caravan park is in a suburban street (away from town centre but also very close by to town centre/a short drive). Can be quiet but can also be very noisy especially over the weekend. Had a few noisy nights with speeding cars and at times cars doing burnouts down the street.
Caravan park is very congested with not much space to park your car and not much privacy between each sites.
Bathroom block was clean but really needs to be  cleaned at least twice a day as became quite dirty. Toilets were ok however the showers were appauling (very very old and looked very dirty, including mould). Really was hesitant to use the showers. Bathroom block getting a renovation in June 2025.
Staff upon arrival, could of been more welcoming.

I booked this campsite a long time ago, but a week before our trip, a family member was hospitalized, so I had to cancel. However, I didn’t receive a refund. When I called to ask about it, they told me that cancellations must be made at least 30 days in advance to get a refund.

Please be aware of this policy. I should have carefully reread the terms before canceling, but I didn’t expect the cancellation period to be 30 days. They should have also confirmed at the time of my cancellation call that the payment would not be refunded.
Only thing it really has going for itself is the location. Screaming kids at all hours. Sites are small. A few mice in the camp kitchen 🐁Front desk staff is lovely though!

Stayed here last night and service was amazing, roomy sites and the staff were very friendly. Will definitely be returning
Brock
Great little caravan park. Quiet street only a block from the beach. Will be even better when the new amenities block is built in June 2025. (Artist impression on display Dec 2024)

A beautiful campground close to the beach (200 m). Especially great for kids to roam around and with an onsite playground and well looked after camp kitchen for the adults with 3 outdoor BBQs. The bathrooms are quite dated but kept clean overall. They are slated to upgrade the facilities by mid 2025. Also, super easy EV charging through powered campsites. Need to bring your own mobile charger though!

1,.We were told there is  7 night minimum booking ...they ALLOWED us to book for 6 but besides us people were staying for one night and leaving. WTF|2. We had 2 small tents and were  put onto a site that had a concrete pad beside bare hard earth. We asked to be moved to the site next to us that was vacant that had grass and was suitable to put tents on..the receptionist told us no we couldn't move and one time she went camping and had to make compromises WTF! Very unhelpful and condescending staff |3. Showers gross, |4. Camp kitchen -bare minimum - with the bonus of mice running around the bench tops. |We left a day early. |Poorly maintained, inconsiderate staff. |
Perfect on arrival and clean. Super clean and lovely admin merry Christmas.

Sehr freundliche, äusserst hilfsbereite und unkomplizierte Receptionistin. Der Platz ist gut gelegen um mit einem schönen Spaziergang das Zentrum von Esperance zu erreichen. Nächstes Jahr werden die sanitären Einrichtungen neu sein
Lovely ladies on check in, gave us a nice quiet spot. Walking distance to the beach. Thankyou for a restful few days 🫶🏻
This is a great little park. Staff is very welcoming

Staff are lovely and campsites generous. The amenities are being renovated next year but in the mean time they are still clean and nice enough. Much preferred staying here compared to RAC where it’s just a mountain of kids. Quiet peaceful and great location

This caravan park now appears to be under new ownership and has plans for a major redevelopment of the amenities. I have found the existing amenities to be clean and well maintained. The previous reviews of the old management and owners was mostly negative, so let's hope the current owners can turn that negativity around to positive reviews. The ladies at reception were very polite and helpful when I first arrived. Since I started this review I have spoken to an Esperence lady who has lived in the vicinity of this caravan park for Fifty years and she has nothing but high regards for the new owner.

Tania was an exceptional front of house asset. Friendly, full of information.
Facilities a little dated but about tobe upgraded. Fantastic camp kitchen and BBQ area. All staff friendly and obviously passionate about their workplace. Neat clean tidy and all park facilities within easy walk of all sites.
Small but very friendly and the service was fantastic

Powered site.
Good facilities

Wonderful kind staff. lovely spacious van park. 90 second walk to beach.
Everything to love about Bathers

Lovely quiet park a block from the beach. The staff are helpful, friendly and accommodating. Nothing is too much trouble. The manager has started a veggie garden for guests and it's a really thoughtful touch. Ducks are great. Love it. Thank you all.

Wonderfully resources and very clean camp kitchen that is fully enclosed and out of any wind that may be around. And only one very short block away from the beach. I liked the casual atmosphere and the garden that was available for us campers to get some veggies from.

Same price as other parks without the upgrades. Kind of place you go to when everything else is full. I'm not a squeamish guy but they expect you to handle the disgusting shower mats with the campground's collective tinea before and after a shower. Rank.

It was great no pin required for toilets
And a phone to open boom after no pin ✅

The amenities are clean and tidy, but are old and in need of updating. The sites are a good size and have concrete pads for your awning area. The caravan park is 6km out of Esperance, but one street from the beach. This is a no frills caravan park with no playground.
Great for what we needed at that time.

Smaller caravan park at the end suburb of Esperance.  Far enough out of the CBD to enjoy a walk on the beach from esplanade to work off those holiday calories.  Not a big park and in a residential area.  The staff were polite, helpful, cheerful and engaging.  Lots of single nite campers.  We stayed for 7 nights and were most satisfied.  Ablutions cleaned daily.  This park has all you need to service your caravan park needs without the price tag of the bigger bells and whistle parks.  Camping on grass which is always nice.  Has a IGA and petrol station two blocks away.  With our receipt when booking in we provided a discount coupon at Lucky Bay Brewery (buy 1 pizza 2nd pizza free -saved us $24) and a further coupon for nearby Nanagai on the Hill Restaurant.  That was a nice touch.  Happy to recommend this park for those that don’t need (nor want to pay) for 5 star.

We went to Esperance in the holiday period. We didn't knew it. Normally we don't make a reservation many days before arriving.
We visited and called many hotels, motels and Caravans Parks but none of them had a room or spot available.

Our last chance was Bathers Paradise Caravan Park. The lady of the reception was very kind. She gives us two option where we could sleep at the Campsite.

Thanks to her wonderful help we could spend the night there.
Great caravan park, close to everything, amenities tried but clean $35 powered sites, September 2024
New owners really look after this place looks amazing and service is great!

This is a really relaxing little park, run by very friendly helpful people.  The sites are generous with lovely shady trees that don't impose onto sites.  Once the new amenities are completed we can see wonderful things happening for the new owners.

Beautifully maintained relaxing park. Very well layed out. Its a simple older park with nice grass, close the the beach, shops taven fuel etc. Staff are very professional and seem to know the best site for your van. Made to feel very welcome. Site is a good size. Very happy with our choice of park.

Quiet and pleasant park.  Showers and toilets are clean and functional.
Its a 40 min leisurely walk into the town center for supplies if you are on foot.  Electric scooters literally everywhere if you want to get there faster.
Lady running the front desk was lovely.  I think the angry lady from earlier reviews may have moved on.

We stayed at Bather’s Paradise for 4 nights and were delighted with the quiet atmosphere and high standard of cleanliness throughout the park.
Only heard a bit of Road noise in the early evening then very quiet.
Well equipped and friendly owner operated business. Would recommend this CP highly.
Sheryl Reynolds
No complaints.  Spotlessly clean.  Fantastic quiet location.  Beautiful beach opposite.  Would definitely stay again.

Good, clean facilities and a handy location but lots of road noise, nearby at night, was disappointing. Booked and paid for 4 nights as I was told it would be quiet. Due to the road noise (at all hours even on a Sunday night!) I checked out after 2 nights but was advised that no proportional refund would be considered. Definitely couldn't recommend this park for peace and quiet. ☹️
Nice quiet spot, friendly staff, walking distance to dog beach shops everything.

We have been at bathers paradise caravan park in Esperance, stay 4 nights pay for 3 great small park and very tidy and clean. Not many parks have fresh flowers in both men’s and ladies amenities.
Very quiet, the only thing is the weather we were looking for blue skies to match the water, at least it’s not cold
Well worth the look

Great overnight stay. Facilities are clean, staff very friendly. Close to CBD. Highly recommend.
Tank you for a pleasant stay.
Great caravan park.  Lady parking the vans   Has no sense of humour but she did her job well.  Would recommend this park it’s close to town and the beach.

We had a good stay and unable to fathom some of the negative feedback. Place is spotless and really well maintained. Great facilities and only 3km from the town centre with cafe restaurant, iGA, and pharmacy 600 metres.
Quiet park, clean and super neat, will go there again.

Had a great two night camping stay at Bathers Paradise. Found their showers to be hot with great water pressure and very clean. Their kitchen was also extremely well stocked with everything that you could possibly need and more! The laundry machines/dryers were also very helpful for some on-road campers.

Was a great spot to park under some trees for a few nights and wait out of the big storm. Great for the price and would recommend!
Whatever has been said here before is true. The girls have this place running like a well oiled machine.
Very clean amenities and park.  Very neat and tidy sites.

Staff were aggressive and rude. We surprised by how abrasive and condescending the older english woman was upon checking in and one of the cleaners also spoke to us aggressively in passing. The facilities were nice but the staff definitely did not make you feel welcome.

We had a great stay at Bathers Paradise CP. I really can’t understand all of the bad reviews; all the staff we encountered were lovely, the ablutions were clean and the campsite itself was well located and spacious. We would definitely stay again.

What a wonderful park! The staff are fantastic and very helpful and friendly. The amenities are spotless and there is a great camp kitchen and laundry. The sites are very well maintained and lots of green grass. We loved that we were protected from the wind. Will definitely stay here again.

Fantastic caravan park.  Stayed for 1 week.  Welcomed at reception. Hubby was guided into our bay by the owner,  (thankfully).  Amenities top notch, very clean and accessible, love the flowers in the bathroom. Lovely, quiet location, only a few minutes drive into town.|We will definitely be back, hopefully with friends next time.

Only new to caravanning in the last year but this park is now the benchmark for future trips. Cleanliness of amenities, the state of the grassed areas and surrounds are second to none.
On arrival you are escorted to your site and assisted with your reversing abilities (which saves a lot of grief with partners)
Well done guys, will certainly recommend to others
Lovely little park dog friendly not on school holidays beside that I would go back there to stay close to everything we needed for our time there

Loved Esperance, lots to see and explore also loved bathers caravan park, its quiet, well kept, bays for your caravan are well marked out and plenty room for your awning. Great caravan park very central, I love the flowers in toilets it just adds that special touch. Amenities all clean would definitely stay there again, and staff were friendly too. Thanks for having us.  😊
Nice caravan park. Kitchen is quite tiny so mostly you have to wait until you can cook something. Beach is nearby.

We stayed here over the Easter weekend with family and friends and loved it.
-Very well kept park with green grass and neat caravan bays.
-The toilets and showers were kept nice and clean.
-Only a few minutes drive into the main strip of Esperance.
The ladies running the park were also very friendly and even handed out Easter eggs to everyone on the Sunday.
Thanks for having us!

Had a horrible experience in this park staff the short old woman very rude, Park has no gates so people comes and go at night time stay and leave early in the morning, showers and toilet are very old and not worth $50/P has nothing to offer !!!!!

Personnel deplorable, detestable, horrible !
Nous accuse d'avoir voler un tapis pour mettre notre tente dessus. S'appercois à la fin que non ! Même pas un "désolé" aucunes excuses !!
Éviter ce caravan park si vous avez la possibilité... il y a pas plus aigri que ici.
Great caravan park,clean facilities and friendly staff

Traveling Oz since September 2022 and this caravanpark is shocking if it comes to costumer service.
Called earlier to check if there was avaliability and maybe specials if you stay couple extra days. When I arrived on site the lady on the phone was not welcoming at all, she called me that cheap dude that wants a special price. We eventually went to this park cause it was the only one with avaliability. You get only 1 WiFi ticket for 1GB per booking oer day. They cant help you after hours. Good option if this is the only one avaliable. Ablutions are old and they dont have a pool. Yet it was 49 bucks for unpowered a night. I would NOT do this with the kids at all.

The greeting from the cranky, man hating Supervisor type person wasn’t a great way to welcome somebody to your business.
That needs to be sorted out, or She needs to be given the flick.
Location was pretty good, the ambience was okay. It reminded me of the holiday resorts we used to go to on school holidays on the NSW South Coast in the 1960’s.
Old, and maybe a bit rundown but, comfortable enough.
Great park very clean amenities and the sites are mowed raked and watered everyday by friendly staff
Could not fault in any way. Our best park experience ever. The way the friendly staff greet you and maintain the grounds and facilities is to be commended. We'll be back.
Wonderful caravan Park! Friendliest helpful staff. Spotlessly clean! Great sites kept meticulous! The campers kitchen is the most equipped we have come across! Close to dog friendly beach. Excellent!

Unfortunately just tried to book here for two nights, but had a really disappointingly rude woman on the phone. She asked us where we were coming from as check in closes at 16:30 - we told her we’d be driving from Bremer Bay and were hoping to stop at Stirling Range for a hike along the way, but would skip this or just leave much earlier in order to not be late for check in. She chose not to believe us on this, told us we couldn’t book and hung up. Maybe she didn’t like our English accents?
Very impatient staff. So they keep the park well maintained. But it always affects mood when you’re treated rudely.
Good, clean facility however staff are rude and very unpleasant. Don’t think I have seen any of them smile. Seems very strict and not relaxing.

Stayed here 3 times before great little caravan park we recommend here to fellow travellers
Well done girls

Entgegen der vielen negativen Bewertungen können wir nur Positives berichten, wir waren 4 Nächte dort, vom Einchecken bis zur Abreise haben wir keine schlechten Erfahrungen gemacht, Donna hat uns nett empfangen und alles gut erklärt und benötigtes Informationsmaterial ausgehändigt, unser Stellplatz war ein schönes Rasenstück, der Strand ist fußläufig erreichbar, der Great Ocean Drive ist auch in unmittelbarer Nähe und absolut empfehlenswert, wenn man sich also an die Regeln wie auf jedem anderen Caravan-Park hält, hat man auch auf diesem Platz keinerlei Probleme, sehr empfehlenswert*****
The top spot in Esperance, well just out of it actually, but an absolute rippa. Friendly staff looked after us, deluxe.

Gave them 2 months notice of cancelling and no deposit refunded! Paid deposit and then received terms and conditions stating no refund if cancelled. Would have been nice to know this before we paid the deposit!
Very bad customer service.
Will advise friends to avoid .

We have worked and travelled Australia for a number of years, recently came into WA and stayed at Bathers for 7 nights
It's one of the most tidiest, friendly, quietest and greenest parks we have stayed in. It's very popular, close to all the tourist most dos and central to town
Would go back again

This caravan park was absolutely unpleasant, I've never in my life experience such rude service and care, I'm disgusted, the older lady with the tattooed eyebrows was so rude to us on our arrival calling us idiots which was far beyond called for, I was shocked and it ruined our experience in essperance, I'll be warning all of my friends to stay away, we had also heard by the campers next to us that she was yelling at some other guest in the office before our arrival and as we checked out we overheard her being rude to another guest, So disappointing, another thing to mention is that the amenities are not up to scratch, take my advice and don't book at Bathers Paradise caravan Park!

Since the staff does not specify the capacity of the dryer, and the machine was broken before use, we spent $18 on 6 dryers that never worked. I wanted to complain and the very rude and aggressive staff they blamed me responded that I had to pay to fix the dryer, laughing in my face quite arrogantly. The oven does not work, the dryer does not work, the washing machine does not wash correctly, they are not in excellent condition, the customer service is very unpleasant and rude. THAT'S WHY I WOULD NOT RETURN AND I WOULD NEVER RECOMMEND IT.

It was a great stay.
The camping site was big and we had plenty of space in our set locations, the bathrooms were clean, the staff was very nice and it is very well located.
We will be coming back here next time! 😊

This caravan park is ideal. It is one street away from the beach. The park is not too big and is near fuel station and shops.
It's quiet or was when we were there. Nice relaxing place to be.
They went out of the way to get us a place to put our swags

After 13 months travelling around the country we’ve never felt more unwelcome or uncomfortable at a caravan park/campsite! We stayed for 9 nights and it was constant from the rude and unpleasant check-in all the way to them watching over you pack up to ensure you leave by 10am. We definitely will not be back!

Have never met such a miserable bunch of hosts.. refused to accommodate two families next to each other (even though requested at time of booking months ago) and the staff roam around like angry dictators looking for a reason to scold anyone and everyone.
The passive aggressive signs posted around the park are the icing on the cake.  Would not stay again, nor recommend.

What a delightful little park. We received a warm welcome and Sharon expertly guided us into our site. Staff were always friendly during our stay and happy to chat. Not sure what all the negative comments are about to be honest. Very well kept park, large well marked sites, lovely green grass and spotless amenities. Amenities are a little dated but cannot fault the cleanliness and the radio playing and flowers by the sinks is a nice touch.
Large laundry room with multiple machines (front loaders - $6, top loaders - $4) and a separate machine outside for washing dog blankets. Large inside camp kitchen that looked well equipped. Lots of Christmas decorations have been put up so felt very festive. Short walk to the beach and about a 20 min walk to the jetty. Would definitely stay again.
Staff very unpleasant, disrespectful and hostile towards internationals.

Perfect stay for us. We booked last minute to fill a few days, and end up changing our other accomodation to come back. The team were more than helpful and accomodating for us with small children. Quiet, clean and exactly what we wanted. Will definitely be staying here next time we come to Esperance.
Great caravan park here at Esperance, very clean, tidy and well designed
Lovely campsite with great facilities and fairly friendly staff.

A beautiful well maintained  park, with grassed sites & immaculately clean older facilities. It’s a smaller quieter park and not overcrowded . Sharon & her hubby the owners are lovely along with all the staff  & are all very helpful . Sharon directs you into your sites which we were fine with but we did notice some mens egos were bruised by this. We ended up staying 16 nights  longer than what we had booked for & could have easily stayed longer. We will definitely be back 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

This place has to be the cleanest and tidiest Caravan park we have visited in the last 2.5 years on the road. Not new by any means, but extremely well looked after by very friendly staff. Highly recommended.

This park is lovely. The shower and toilet blocks are so clean and smells beautiful an added bonus a Bunch of flowers in vase on the basins. Sharon is a very happy lady that knows her stuff. This place is loved and maintained.
Thanks you guys.
Kerrie and Neil Dobbyn.

A beautiful, well maintained, clean, grassed, quiet and not overcrowded as it's a smaller park. Turned up without a booking and the ladies made us feel very welcome, and we got a terrific shaded site. Thank you for our 3 night stay. Would fully recommend here over the huge packed in like sardines big park down the road.
Calm and quiet spot to relax and enjoy Esperance.  Grass sites, shade trees, pleasant staff, clean facilities- with fresh flowers- , close to beach and easy ride or drive to town.

One of the rather average campgrounds during our 3 weeks road trip
Location is nice, very close to the beach and short drive to the National park.
Facilities seem a bit worn and could use renovation. Camp itself feels overcrowded, there is not enough space so it feels a little awkward to have 5 people run by your window every minute.
The kitchen is way too small for the number of people here.
Friendly staff

Fabulous week staying here, very friendly staff. Very clean, quiet and well kept park.
Great facilities and lots of room for each  caravan to park up on.
Definitely recommend.

The place is super clean and well organised. We spent 3 nights.
We had no trouble until one of the caretaker acted super strange towards my brother as he was parked outside the camp, waiting for us to go to the restaurant together, the lady acted violently, yelling and threatening to call the cops for no reason ("you're parked in an illegal spot") without even letting my brother say a word - ( and no, it was not the staff parking). She probably assumed something stupid we won't even know what - as she would'nt allow any communication.
Lovely little caravan park which is spotlessly clean and friendly staff. We would highly recommend it
Staff very unpleasant, disrespectful and hostile towards internationals.
Super friendly staff! Lovely little campround with good shady sites. Definetly recommend for staying in Esperance :)

Fabulous location, gardens very well maintained, amenities very clean and most importantly my fur baby Banjo was welcomed. Sharon was fabulous and even offered to lend us a pen for our puppy. It is the little touches that are special, such as fresh cut flowers for the male and female amenities.

Amazing park awesome staff. Highly recommend this park. Beautiful spread out park not crammed in. Clean and tidy restrooms and laundry area, lots of machines. Dog friendly too.  Definitely will be back. Brett and Di's Travels.

We were delighted with our stay at Bathers Paradise.   On arrival, we were greeted by Sharon who instantly directed my husband to our allocated site and directed him in!   There were three other women waiting with me at the office and we all agreed we want to take Sharon with us for all our 'directives' into spots...  !

The park is immaculate and all areas are impeccably  maintained.   Well done Team Bathers Paradise!   Highly recommend....   Jenny Boden  -  Victoria

What a lovely little park. The lady owner, Sharon has done a magic job, green grass, shady trees & she happily guides all her guests into their sites. The amenities have fresh flowers and are sparkling clean. The beach is a short walk away as is local shops and fuel. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Excellent amenities. Old but very clean. Cleanest we have seen on our trip. Very well stocked kitchen and good laundry with lots of machines. Quiet. Dog facilities. Grassed sites. Less expensive than others in Esperance.
Great location and very welcoming staff. Facilities are well maintained. The people staffing this caravan park obviously care about their customers.

Nice park, good size sites and amenities very clean. It is close to the dog friendly beach but beware of their dog policy, no dogs to be walked in the park. Nothing like walking your 🐕 out on the street in your jim jams.

Mixed feelings about this caravan park. Make sure you read the strict dog policy before booking to see if it’s for you. No walking dogs around the caravan park we thought was a bit nuts, but our bad for not reading the rules properly. The grounds are small enough though that you can walk out front and have a stroll with your dog.

The facilities were good, and clean, and I appreciated the dog cleaning station for towels. It is a very lovely park. However this place felt tightly controlled and highly surveilled. We were definitely being watched by a guy who might’ve been management, hard to tell.

I can see that this setup really works for a lot of people, but for us - especially with dogs - it felt stressful, like walking on egg shells. We were glad to leave.
2 nights stay on a powered site. Staff are amazing. Couldn't be more helpful or pleasant. Lovely park and clean amenities. Don't worry about the fees, just enjoy the visit.
Lovely quiet park with clean amenities, great laundry with dryers,
Lovely Park, very clean and helpful Management.
Good place to visit and stay

Wife and I are new to caravanning we have traveled from Mornington peninsula and have stayed in a few caravan parks but staying at bathers paradise made us feel comfortable, safe and enjoyable. Sharon gave me a lesson in reversing my caravan onto site. And I appreciated it. The staff were very friendly and helpful The little touches like the flowers, radio are special
Keep it up Sharon definitely will visit again👍👍👍
